Gemeinsam spielen per Code oder Link: Play together by code or link

Handle direkt mit anderen Spielern oder: Trade directly with other players or use harbors to turn a tight hand into the next strong move.
Hexagonia bringt Strategie und Handel in: Hexagonia brings strategy and trade to the browser.
Hexagonia funktioniert nicht nur am Desk: Hexagonia works not just on desktop, but also in mobile browsers. That means you can join and continue your round while on the go.
Hexagonia ist 100 % kostenlos und wird e: Hexagonia is 100% free and will stay that way.
Hexagonia lebt von direkten Entscheidung: Hexagonia lives from direct decisions: build, trade, block, counter, and swing the match in your favor move by move.
Hexagonia setzt auf einen klaren Ablauf:: Hexagonia follows a clear flow: create a round, bring in friends, define the setup, and start together without detours.

There is no settlement of yours here.
Hol Freunde per Code oder Link an den Ti: Bring friends to the table with a code or link and start immediately. Trading, building decisions, robber phases, and development cards bring pressure and real board-game tension straight into the browser.

Kein Abo. Keine Paywalls. Keine bezahlte: No subscription. No paywalls. No paid advantages. Ever.
Kein Feld mit dieser Zahl schüttet Rohst: No tile with this number produces resources.
Kein Würfeln, kein Spielerhandel, kein H: No rolling, no player trade, no harbor trade, and no development cards.
Klassische Spannung, sofort im Browser: Classic tension, instantly in the browser
Konten, Räume und laufende Partien zentr: Manage accounts, rooms, and live matches centrally
Konten, Rollen und Passwort-Resets laufe: Accounts, roles, and password resets are managed here.

match.turnStatus.placePort.select: Choose a marked coast spot for your harbor token.
match.turnStatus.roadBuilding.second: Choose the second free road or end the effect.
match.turnStatus.robber.allDiscarded: All discards are done. The robber will be moved now.

match.turnStatus.settlement.select: Choose a valid spot for your settlement.
match.turnStatus.ship.move: Choose an open ship first and then its new target edge.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.noMove: No legal build or buy is available. You can pass immediately.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.other: {player} is using the special build phase.
match.turnStatus.specialBuild.self: Special build phase: build or buy a development. No player trade, no maritime trade, no playing development cards.
match.turnStatus.trade.answerFromYou.det: {player} is waiting for your trade decision.
match.turnStatus.trade.waitingReply.open: Another player can accept your offer.
match.turnStatus.turnAction.self: Build, trade, or end your turn.
match.turnStatus.waitForPlayer.title: Waiting for {player}
match.turnStatus.yourAction.title: Your action
Melde dich an und geh direkt an deinen T: Sign in and go straight to your table.
Mindestens ein Feld muss aktualisiert we: At least one field must be updated.
Mindestens eine Spieleinstellung muss ge: At least one game setting must be provided.
Mindestens eine Startspieler-Einstellung: At least one starting-player setting must be provided.
Mit 5 oder 6 Spielern ist das erweiterte: With 5 or 6 players, the extended board is required.
Mit einem Code kommen alle ohne Umwege i: A single code gets everyone into the same room without detours.
Mit Freunden spielen, handeln und direkt: Play, trade, and jump in with friends
Mit jedem Wurf, jedem Bau und jedem Deal: Every roll, build, and deal reshapes the board. Strong positions are not random, you earn them move by move.
Modernes Tabletop-Strategy im Browser: Modern tabletop strategy in the browser
musst du jetzt ein markiertes Feld ankli: you must now click a highlighted tile and place the robber.
Nach Anmeldung oder Registrierung spring: After signing in or registering, you will jump directly into the target lobby.
Nach dem Login springst du direkt in Rau: After sign-in, you jump directly into room {code}.
Nach oben zu Hexagonia: Back to the top of Hexagonia
Neue Siedlungen müssen an eine eigene St: New settlements must border one of your own roads.
Nobody is still waiting to discard.
Noch keine offenen Räume oder laufenden: No open rooms or running matches in your list yet.
Nur besetzte Plätze können als erster Sp: Only occupied seats can be selected as the starting player.
Nur der anbietende Spieler kann das Ange: Only the offering player can withdraw the offer.
Nur der Host kann die Spieleinstellungen: Only the host can change the game settings.
Nur der Host kann Spieler aus der Lobby: Only the host can remove players from the lobby.
Nur der Raumbesitzer kann das Spiel star: Only the room owner can start the game.
Nur sitzende Spieler können bereit geset: Only seated players can be marked ready.
Partie durch Admin beendet, weil {userna: Match ended by an admin because {username} was removed.
Partie wurde beendet, weil {username} zu: The match ended because {username} was disconnected for too long.
Partie wurde nach dem Regel-Update beend: The match was ended after a rules update. Please start a new round.
The match was stopped by an admin.
Partie wurde vom Admin zur Reparatur ent: The match was removed by an admin for repair.
Private Einladung für bis zu sechs Spiel: Private invite for up to six players.
Räuber- und Abwurfphasen mit klarem Abla: Robber and discard phases with a clear flow
Räuberphase, Entwicklungskarten, längste: Robber phases, development cards, longest road, and largest army already create real turning points in the match.
Raum {code} wurde administrativ geschlos: Room {code} was closed by an admin.
Raum erstellen oder mit einem Code beitr: Create a room or join with a code
Raum erstellen und deine Runde selbst st: Create a room and start your round yourself.
Room code {code} is waiting for your login.
reCAPTCHA is only available in the browser.
reCAPTCHA-Prüfung konnte nicht abgeschlo: reCAPTCHA verification could not be completed.
Regelprofil konnte nicht geändert werden: Rules preset could not be changed
Ritter, Straßenbau, Erfindung, Monopol u: Knight, road building, year of plenty, monopoly, and victory point cards can completely swing a match, together with the road and army awards.
Runde eröffnen, Code oder Link teilen, P: Open a round, share the code or link, fill the seats, and start together without detours.
Runden mit Sitzplätzen und Ready-State: Rounds with seats and ready state
Schafe, Kakteen, Scheunen, Ziegelstapel: Sheep, cacti, barns, brick stacks, and other field props.
Schnell rein, direkt spielen: Jump in and play right away
Setup-Modi mit kontrolliertem Spielstart: Setup modes with controlled match start
Sobald alle am Tisch sind, geht es direk: As soon as everyone is at the table, the match starts immediately: build, trade, roll, and set up the next strong move.
Spieleinstellungen können nur in der Lob: Game settings can only be changed in the lobby.
Spieler 2 führt jetzt seine Zusatzaktion: Player 2 is now taking the bonus action.
Spieler können nur in der Lobby entfernt: Players can only be removed in the lobby.
Spielfeld konnte nicht geändert werden: Board size could not be changed
Startet mit 3 bis 6 sitzenden Spielern,: Start with 3 to 6 seated players as soon as everyone is ready. Rules and starting player apply to the next match.
Startmodus konnte nicht geändert werden: Starting mode could not be changed
Start-Siedlungen, Start-Straßen sowie Vo: Initial settlements, initial roads, and forward and reverse setup are clearly represented, whether you play on a variable or prepared board.
Startspieler konnte nicht geändert werde: Starting player could not be changed
Straßen müssen an das eigene Netz anschl: Roads must connect to your own network.
Von diesem Spieler kann hier nicht gesto: You cannot steal from that player here.
Vor Spielstart würfeln alle sitzenden Sp: Before the match starts, all seated players roll. Only the first player is determined this way.
Wähle den Spieler aus, von dem gestohlen: Choose the player to steal from.
Wähle, welche Elemente auf dem Spielfeld: Choose which elements are shown on the board.
Wenn der Räuber kommt, werden Karten kna: When the robber appears, cards get tight, strong tiles are blocked, and a well-placed move hits exactly the right opponent.
Zeigt die Ressourcensymbole direkt auf d: Shows resource icons directly on the tile markers.
Zuerst müssen alle geforderten Karten ab: All required cards must be discarded first.
Zugregel konnte nicht geändert werden: Turn rule could not be changed
Zur Startseite von Hexagonia: Go to the Hexagonia home page

room.newWorldSetup.hint.official: Starts directly with the official open random setup for terrain, number tokens, and randomly distributed harbors.
room.newWorldSetup.hint.editor: Non-official: the match starts in a shared setup phase where terrain, number tokens, and harbors are placed from pools.
room.hero.detail: Private invite for up to six players.
room.controls.title: Get ready
room.controls.joinHint: When you join, you automatically get the next available seat.
room.controls.startHint: Start with 3 to 6 seated players as soon as everyone is ready. Rules and starting player apply to the next match.
room.boardSize.hint.extendedRequired: With 5 or 6 players, the extended board is required.
room.boardSize.hint.standardOptional: With 3 or 4 players, the host can switch between the standard and extended board.
room.setup.hint.beginnerColors: In beginner setup with 3 players, the match colors are reassigned to the official beginner colors.
room.setup.hint.beginnerOnlyStandard: Beginner setup is only available on the standard board.
room.startingPlayer.hint.roll: Before the match starts, all seated players roll. Only the first player is determined this way.
room.startingPlayer.hint.manual: Only occupied seats can be selected as the starting player.
room.seat.label: Seat {count}
room.custom.baseSummary: In base custom mode, board size, turn rule, starting player, and victory goal stay configurable.
room.custom.seafarersSummary: In Seafarers custom mode, scenario, official layout plan, starting player, and victory goal stay configurable.
room.official.summary: The latest official rules always apply: {summary}.

scenario.base.standard.title: Standard game
scenario.base.standard.summary: Classic Catan with the official variable layout and 10 victory points.
scenario.seafarers.headingForNewShores.s: Introductory scenario with islands, ships, and longest trade routes.
scenario.seafarers.fourIslands.title: The Four Islands
scenario.seafarers.fourIslands.summary: Four island groups connected by sea routes and expansion across multiple islands.
scenario.seafarers.sixIslands.title: The Six Islands
scenario.seafarers.sixIslands.summary: 5-6 player island exploration variant on the extended board.
scenario.seafarers.fogIslands.title: The Fog Islands
scenario.seafarers.fogIslands.summary: Unknown tiles are revealed through exploration and reward discoveries.
scenario.seafarers.throughTheDesert.summ: A sea of desert, remote islands, and a hard race for new shores.
scenario.seafarers.forgottenTribe.title: The Forgotten Tribe
scenario.seafarers.forgottenTribe.summar: Discover special markers, development cards, and collectible harbors.
scenario.seafarers.clothForCatan.title: Cloth for Catan
scenario.seafarers.clothForCatan.summary: Villages produce cloth that you secure and score through sea routes.
scenario.seafarers.pirateIslands.title: The Pirate Islands
scenario.seafarers.pirateIslands.summary: Warships, fortresses, and the pirate fleet reshape building and combat at sea.
scenario.seafarers.wondersOfCatan.title: The Wonders of Catan
scenario.seafarers.wondersOfCatan.summar: Claim a wonder and build it in stages on your way to victory.
scenario.seafarers.newWorld.title: New World
scenario.seafarers.newWorld.summary: Official New World scenario with an open random setup. In custom rooms, the host can optionally enable a setup editor.

landing.header.tagline: Catan online, straight in the browser
landing.invite.redirect: Sign in or register and we will open the room right away.
landing.hero.title: Catan with friends, without friction
landing.hero.lead: Open a private room, share the code, and start instantly on desktop, iPad, and iPhone.
landing.hero.fairPlay: Every move is validated by the server under the original rules.
landing.hero.freeBody: No download, no install, straight in the browser.
landing.hero.badge.table.label: Table
landing.hero.badge.round.label: Round
landing.hero.badge.invite.label: Invite
landing.section.flow.title: At the table in just a few steps
landing.section.flow.body: From sign-in to the first roll without detours or extra setup.
landing.flow.startRound.title: Open a room
landing.flow.startRound.body: Start your private table directly from the hub.
landing.flow.shareInvite.title: Share the invite
landing.flow.shareInvite.body: Send the code or link to your group and bring everyone straight into the game.
landing.flow.configureMatch.title: Configure the match
landing.flow.configureMatch.body: Rules, scenario, and setup stay centralized and easy to control.
landing.flow.startPlaying.title: Start playing
landing.flow.startPlaying.body: Placing, rolling, trading, and building stay live and cleanly synchronized.
landing.section.build.title: Everything a round needs
landing.section.build.body: Lobby, board, trading, development, and Seafarers all fit into one clear flow.
landing.features.boardDynamics.title: Board logic with clarity
landing.features.boardDynamics.body: Layouts, harbors, sea routes, and highlights stay readable and rules-safe.
landing.features.boardDynamics.detail: Server and UI stay in the same state.
landing.features.friendsAtTable.title: Friends at the table fast
landing.features.friendsAtTable.body: Rooms, seats, statuses, and reconnects are tuned for private sessions.
landing.features.tradeHarbors.title: Trading without drag
landing.features.tradeHarbors.body: Offers, counteroffers, and harbor trades stay fast and unambiguous.
landing.features.tradeHarbors.detail: Clean actions instead of chat chaos.
landing.features.robberDevelopment.title: Robber and cards guided
landing.features.robberDevelopment.body: Discards, target selection, development cards, and follow-up actions stay step by step.
landing.features.robberDevelopment.detai: No hidden rules in the UI.
landing.section.mechanics.title: Original rules, modern flow
landing.section.mechanics.body: The key Catan flows stay clear, fast, and comfortable on mobile.
landing.mechanics.boardSetup.title: Setup like the original
landing.mechanics.boardSetup.body: Initial placement, number tokens, harbors, and scenarios follow the official rules.
landing.mechanics.trading.title: Trade with fewer clicks
landing.mechanics.trading.body: Offers, responses, and harbor trades stay fast, direct, and easy to read.
landing.mechanics.robber.title: Robber phases without confusion
landing.mechanics.robber.body: Discarding, target selection, and confirmation stay clearly separated and server-validated.
landing.mechanics.development.title: Development cards with clean timing
landing.mechanics.development.body: Playability, blockers, and follow-up actions stay rules-faithful in the flow.
landing.mechanics.friends.title: Bring friends together quickly
landing.mechanics.friends.body: Share the room code, reconnect, and keep playing on every device.
landing.mechanics.mobile.title: Built with mobile in mind
landing.mechanics.mobile.body: Large targets, clear panels, and fast transitions even on iOS Safari.
landing.access.title: Sign in and start
landing.access.body: Use your game account to open rooms, accept invites, and resume matches.
landing.access.highlight.defaultBody: Open your own table right away and invite friends in.
landing.access.highlight.inviteBody: After signing in, you go straight into room {code}.
landing.auth.inviteAfterLogin: After signing in, we open the matching room immediately.
landing.auth.recaptcha.prefix: By signing in you accept the
landing.footer.body: Hexagonia brings private Catan sessions cleanly to desktop and mobile without slowing the match down.
landing.footer.tagline: Private rooms, official rules, direct matches.
profile.music.title: Music player
profile.sound.title: UI sounds
profile.haptics.title: Haptics
profile.board.title: Board style
profile.board.description: Choose which elements are shown on the board.
profile.board.pieceStyle.label: Piece style
profile.board.props.title: Props
profile.board.props.description: Sheep, cacti, barns, brick stacks, and other field props.
profile.board.textures.title: Textures
profile.board.textures.description: Detailed ground and surface textures on the tiles.
profile.board.terrainRelief.title: 3D terrain
profile.board.terrainRelief.description: Mountains, trees, dunes, and other terrain relief are layered on top.
profile.board.resourceIcons.title: Resource icons
profile.board.resourceIcons.description: Shows resource icons directly on the tile markers.

match.robberPhase.noneCompleted: Nobody has completed their discard yet.
match.robberPhase.helper.complete: The selection is complete. You can discard now.
match.robberPhase.wait.beforeMove: Before the robber is moved, affected players must discard cards now. Afterwards
